initiate_robe.description: Coarse grey wool, folded with care it doesn't deserve. They want you in it before you step outside the cell.

rusted_key.description: Heavy iron, pitted with age. It fits something old.

wire.description: Stripped copper, pried from a wall panel.

battery.description: A fat little cell, the kind the compound runs on. Still holds a charge.

shiv_light.description: Wire, a cell, and nerve. Just enough light to move by in the dark.
